source: Sonic Retro development documentation, TCRF, Huffman 2009 interview, Buxer 2009 interview
notes: S3&K has a contested composer history. Michael Jackson was initially contracted to compose the S3 soundtrack, but was removed from credits following the Neverland Ranch allegations in late 1993. His collaborators (Buxer, Brooks, Jones, Ross) remained. Senoue and Drossin are the confirmed Sega-internal composers for the S&K half.

candidate_composers.name: Jun Senoue
candidate_composers.style_notes: Energetic, high note density, wide pitch range. Favors FM algorithms 4–7. Active PSG accompaniment. Strong melodic identity with driving rhythms.

candidate_composers.name: Howard Drossin
candidate_composers.style_notes: Darker, more atmospheric. Lower pitch center. Favors algorithms 0–4 (heavier modulation). More sparse PSG usage. Strong rhythmic bass structures.

candidate_composers.name: Brad Buxer
candidate_composers.role: Composer / Keyboardist (Michael Jackson Music Team, uncredited)
candidate_composers.style_notes: Synth-funk and R&B influenced. High PSG/FM ratio. IceCap Zone derived from The Jetzons 'Hard Times' (1981). Strong groove patterns, characteristic layered chords.
connections: Michael Jackson (keyboard director, Off the Wall/Thriller/Bad era)

candidate_composers.name: Cirocco Jones
candidate_composers.style_notes: Lighter melodic style. Moderate density. Higher pitch center than Drossin. Compact arrangements.

candidate_composers.name: Darryl Ross
candidate_composers.style_notes: Upbeat, high note density, clean melodic lines.

candidate_composers.name: Michael Jackson
candidate_composers.confirmation_source: Indirect — via Buxer testimony and musical analysis
candidate_composers.notes: Jackson was removed from official credits after the 1993 Neverland allegations. His direct compositional contribution vs his collaborators' is unclear. IceCap Zone's proto-theme predates S3 (Buxer/Jetzons origin). Several tracks show structural similarity to Jackson's contemporaneous unreleased demos.

candidate_composers.name: Bobby Brooks
candidate_composers.role: Arranger / Producer (Michael Jackson Music Team, uncredited)
candidate_composers.notes: Part of the MJ production team during the S3 sessions.

candidate_composers.name: Donn Combs
candidate_composers.notes: Co-arranger during the MJ S3 sessions.

candidate_composers.name: Bruce Botnik
candidate_composers.notes: Engineered the MJ Sonic 3 recording sessions at Village Recorders.

candidate_composers.name: Sachio Ogawa
candidate_composers.notes: Oversaw sound production for the S3 development.

candidate_composers.name: Masaru Setsumaru
candidate_composers.notes: Credited for sound effects; not music composition.
